set.body: Round 3 H4 lint pattern P10. 9 .Call('am_af_*_bridge', ...) / .Call('am_mlx_*_bridge', ...) sites in wrappers.R:1954, 2490, 2494, 2505, 2508, 2528, 2532, 2548, 2555 were not audited in round 2. If any are wrapped in tryCatch(error=function(e) NULL), partial C-state mutation (e.g., ArrayFire device allocation half-complete, MLX stream partially submitted) would be silently swallowed with no diagnostic. Needs tracing to confirm whether each .Call is inside a swallowing tryCatch. Fix: audit each site, ensure any tryCatch on a .Call uses a classed error and does NOT swallow silently unless the C side guarantees rollback.
set.title: 9 unaudited .Call bridges in wrappers.R may swallow partial C-state mutations
